list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM drive_state ORDER BY run_id DESC

list.name: baseline
list.label: Baseline
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM drive_state ORDER BY run_id

panels.title: Thesis: Mining Reproducible Dependency Updates — Cargo sub-study (Lyuben Todorov, TU Delft RP 2025/2026 Q4). Selected run: $run_id. Baseline: $baseline.

options.content:
- **RQ1 (reproducibility rate)** — what fraction of Dependabot Cargo PRs are reproducible under our fat-image recipe?
- **RQ2 (breaking rate)** — among reproducible updates, what fraction are *breaking* (post fails) vs *non-breaking* (both pass)?
- **RQ3 (temporal variation)** — how do RQ1/RQ2 vary with commit year (2018-2021 DS1 + 2024-2025 live mine, when added)?
- **RQ4 (failure-mode taxonomy)** — for the unreproducible cohort, which categories are responsible, and how do shares shift across eras?

Queries hit `data/pipeline.sqlite` via frser-sqlite-datasource. Per-run scoping via `$run_id`. Live-mine 2024-2025 cohort (RQ3 second half) not yet ingested — the RQ3 panels currently only show DS1 (2018-2021).

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$baseline'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$baseline'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(r2.pct - r1.pct, 1) AS value FROM (SELECT 100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*) AS pct FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id') r2, (SELECT 100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*) AS pct FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline') r1
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(r2.pct - r1.pct, 1) AS value FROM (SELECT 100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*) AS pct FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id') r2, (SELECT 100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*) AS pct FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline') r1

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id'

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: WITH s AS (SELECT status FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' UNION SELECT status FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline') SELECT s.status, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND status=s.status),0) AS run, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND status=s.status),0) AS baseline, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND status=s.status),0) - COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND status=s.status),0) AS delta FROM s ORDER BY run DESC
targets.queryText: WITH s AS (SELECT status FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' UNION SELECT status FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline') SELECT s.status, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND status=s.status),0) AS run, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND status=s.status),0) AS baseline, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND status=s.status),0) - COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND status=s.status),0) AS delta FROM s ORDER BY run DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.category='breaking' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock')
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.category='breaking' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS value FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND reason LIKE '%pre_rc=101, post_rc=0%'
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND reason LIKE '%pre_rc=101, post_rc=0%'

targets.rawQueryText: WITH per AS (SELECT e.version_update_type AS bump, e.category AS cat, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') GROUP BY bump, cat) SELECT bump, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cat='breaking' THEN n END),0) AS breaking, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cat='non-breaking' THEN n END),0) AS non_breaking, ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cat='breaking' THEN n END),0) / SUM(n), 1) AS pct_breaking FROM per GROUP BY bump ORDER BY pct_breaking DESC
targets.queryText: WITH per AS (SELECT e.version_update_type AS bump, e.category AS cat, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') GROUP BY bump, cat) SELECT bump, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cat='breaking' THEN n END),0) AS breaking, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cat='non-breaking' THEN n END),0) AS non_breaking, ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cat='breaking' THEN n END),0) / SUM(n), 1) AS pct_breaking FROM per GROUP BY bump ORDER BY pct_breaking DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT e.dep_name AS dependency, COUNT(*) AS breaking_prs, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.previous_version || '→' || e.new_version) AS sample_bumps FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.category='breaking' GROUP BY e.dep_name HAVING breaking_prs >= 2 ORDER BY breaking_prs DESC LIMIT 25
targets.queryText: SELECT e.dep_name AS dependency, COUNT(*) AS breaking_prs, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.previous_version || '→' || e.new_version) AS sample_bumps FROM drive_state d JOIN entries e ON e.id = REPLACE(REPLACE(d.entry_path,'data/cargo/',''),'.json','') WHERE d.run_id='$run_id' AND d.status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') AND e.category='breaking' GROUP BY e.dep_name HAVING breaking_prs >= 2 ORDER BY breaking_prs DESC LIMIT 25

targets.rawQueryText: WITH per AS (SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, status FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL) SELECT year, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_repro FROM per GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
targets.queryText: WITH per AS (SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, status FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL) SELECT year, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_repro FROM per GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

targets.rawQueryText: WITH r2 AS (SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) AS p FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year), r1 AS (SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) AS p FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year) SELECT r2.year, r2.p AS run_pct, r1.p AS baseline_pct, ROUND(r2.p - r1.p, 1) AS delta FROM r2 LEFT JOIN r1 USING (year) ORDER BY r2.year
targets.queryText: WITH r2 AS (SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) AS p FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year), r1 AS (SELECT SUBSTR(commit_date,1,4) AS year, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) AS p FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND commit_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year) SELECT r2.year, r2.p AS run_pct, r1.p AS baseline_pct, ROUND(r2.p - r1.p, 1) AS delta FROM r2 LEFT JOIN r1 USING (year) ORDER BY r2.year

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT fat_image_tag, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_repro FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND fat_image_tag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fat_image_tag ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT fat_image_tag, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok_n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('ok','ok_after_relock') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_repro FROM drive_state WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND fat_image_tag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fat_image_tag ORDER BY n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC

targets.rawQueryText: WITH cats AS (SELECT category FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' UNION SELECT category FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$baseline') SELECT cats.category, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND category=cats.category),0) AS run, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND category=cats.category),0) AS baseline, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND category=cats.category),0) - COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND category=cats.category),0) AS delta FROM cats ORDER BY run DESC
targets.queryText: WITH cats AS (SELECT category FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' UNION SELECT category FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$baseline') SELECT cats.category, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND category=cats.category),0) AS run, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND category=cats.category),0) AS baseline, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND category=cats.category),0) - COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$baseline' AND category=cats.category),0) AS delta FROM cats ORDER BY run DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(subcategory, '(no E-code)') AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND category='RUSTC_BITROT' GROUP BY subcategory ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(subcategory, '(no E-code)') AS code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND category='RUSTC_BITROT' GROUP BY subcategory ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

targets.rawQueryText: WITH classified AS (SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY category) SELECT CASE WHEN category IN ('NIGHTLY_REQUIRED','REPO_GONE','TIMEOUT','RUNTIME_CRASH','TEST_FAILURE','MSRV_TOO_LOW') THEN 'corpus property' WHEN category IN ('NATIVE_DEP_MISSING','LOCK_FILE_STALE','OPENSSL_MISMATCH','DEPENDENCY_RESOLUTION') THEN 'pipeline-fixable' WHEN category='RUSTC_BITROT' THEN 'mixed (era-routing)' ELSE 'other' END AS bucket, SUM(n) AS n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(n) / (SELECT SUM(n) FROM classified), 1) AS pct FROM classified GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY n DESC
targets.queryText: WITH classified AS (SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS n FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY category) SELECT CASE WHEN category IN ('NIGHTLY_REQUIRED','REPO_GONE','TIMEOUT','RUNTIME_CRASH','TEST_FAILURE','MSRV_TOO_LOW') THEN 'corpus property' WHEN category IN ('NATIVE_DEP_MISSING','LOCK_FILE_STALE','OPENSSL_MISMATCH','DEPENDENCY_RESOLUTION') THEN 'pipeline-fixable' WHEN category='RUSTC_BITROT' THEN 'mixed (era-routing)' ELSE 'other' END AS bucket, SUM(n) AS n, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(n) / (SELECT SUM(n) FROM classified), 1) AS pct FROM classified GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY n DESC

targets.rawQueryText: WITH p AS (SELECT category, COALESCE(subcategory,'(none)') AS sub, candidate_key, SUBSTR(candidate_key, 1, INSTR(candidate_key,'#')-1) AS repo FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND subcategory IS NOT NULL) SELECT category, sub, COUNT(*) AS rows, COUNT(DISTINCT repo) AS distinct_repos, ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT repo)) / COUNT(*), 0) AS pct_dup FROM p GROUP BY category, sub HAVING rows >= 3 ORDER BY rows DESC LIMIT 30
targets.queryText: WITH p AS (SELECT category, COALESCE(subcategory,'(none)') AS sub, candidate_key, SUBSTR(candidate_key, 1, INSTR(candidate_key,'#')-1) AS repo FROM drive_state_classifications WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND subcategory IS NOT NULL) SELECT category, sub, COUNT(*) AS rows, COUNT(DISTINCT repo) AS distinct_repos, ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT repo)) / COUNT(*), 0) AS pct_dup FROM p GROUP BY category, sub HAVING rows >= 3 ORDER BY rows DESC LIMIT 30
